hero.headline: Smart hosting. Real returns.
hero.subheadline: Compliance meets ROI. Automated financial reporting and intelligent yield optimization for the modern STR operator.

valueProposition.title: Transform Hosting Into Wealth
valueProposition.description: Data-driven property management focused on financial results. No guesswork. Just data.

items.title: Smart Pricing
items.description: Dynamic pricing algorithm adjusts rates in real-time based on demand, seasonality, and competition.

items.title: Synced Calendars
items.description: Auto-sync with Airbnb, Booking, VRBO, and channel managers. Zero manual work.

items.title: Revenue Optimization
items.description: AI identifies growth opportunities. Increase bookings 35% on average.

items.title: Financial Reports
items.description: Real-time dashboards with ROI, expenses, taxes, and forecasts. Master your numbers.

items.title: Regulatory Compliance
items.description: Updated with GDPR, local tax laws, and regulations. Hosting that's safe and legal.

items.title: 24/7 Support
items.description: Expert team in English, Portuguese, and Spanish. Response in minutes, not hours.

questions.question: How do I get started?
questions.answer: Create an account in 2 minutes, no credit card required. Connect your properties via iCal and you're set!

questions.question: What's the setup cost?
questions.answer: Zero. No hidden fees. Pay only the monthly subscription.

questions.question: Do you support my country?
questions.answer: Yes! Lodgra supports Brazil, Portugal, Europe, and USA. More markets coming soon.

questions.question: Do I need a credit card to try it?
questions.answer: Yes, we require a credit card to start your trial. But here's the great part: if you're not completely satisfied with Lodgra during your 7 days, we'll refund your money 100%. No questions asked.

questions.question: How do I integrate with my channels?
questions.answer: Connect via iCal (Airbnb, Booking, VRBO) or use our API. Auto-sync 24/7.

questions.question: Do you offer support in English?
questions.answer: Yes! 24/7 support in English, Portuguese, and Spanish. Response in minutes.

finalCta.headline: Start earning smarter today.
finalCta.subheadline: Try Lodgra for 7 days. If you don't love it, we'll refund your money. Guaranteed.
finalCta.note: Full access for 7 days. Money back if not satisfied.
